exploreUrl:
玄幻::/list1/{{page}}.html
武侠::/list2/{{page}}.html
都市::/list3/{{page}}.html
历史::/list4/{{page}}.html
网游::/list5/{{page}}.html
科幻::/list6/{{page}}.html
言情::/list7/{{page}}.html
其他::/list8/{{page}}.html

ruleToc.nextTocUrl: @js: var pageLinks = JSON.parse(java.getElements(result, '.page-item a') || '[]'); var maxPage = 1; for (var i = 0; i < pageLinks.length; i++) { var href = java.getString(pageLinks[i], 'href') || ''; var m = href.match(/index_(\d+)\.html/); if (m) { var n = parseInt(m[1], 10); if (n > maxPage) maxPage = n; } } if (maxPage <= 1) return ''; var current = String(baseUrl || ''); var currentMatch = current.match(/index_(\d+)\.html/); var currentPage = currentMatch ? parseInt(currentMatch[1], 10) : 0; if (currentPage + 1 >= maxPage) return ''; return 'index_' + (currentPage + 1) + '.html';

ruleContent.nextContentUrl: @js: var links = JSON.parse(java.getElements(result, 'a') || '[]'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { var text = java.getString(links[i], 'text') || ''; if (text.indexOf('下一') >= 0) { return java.getString(links[i], 'href') || ''; } } return '';
ruleContent.replaceRegex:
第\(\d+\/\d+\)页##
